overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Assassin's Creed Unity showing the protagonist exploring Notre-Dame Cathedral during the French Revolution. The character walks through the Gothic interior past crowds of NPCs, with dramatic beams of sunlight streaming through stained glass windows, transitioning from the crowded nave to the quieter choir area.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic cathedral nave with revolutionary gathering

events.description: camera tilts upward revealing dramatic light beams streaming through upper windows

agents.ego_description: walking steadily down the central nave toward the altar area, observing the architecture

notable_agents.action: crowd of revolutionaries gathered facing the altar area

entered.detail: soaring Gothic nave with pointed arches and ribbed vaults
red white and blue revolutionary flags hanging from columns
massive stone pillars with ornate capitals lining the nave
black and white checkered marble tile flooring
simple wooden seating along the left wall

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in the vast Gothic nave of Notre-Dame Cathedral, with the protagonist walking forward toward a gathering of revolutionaries. French tricolor flags hang from the stone columns, and dramatic beams of sunlight pierce through the high windows, illuminating the checkered marble floor.

scene_state.functional_zone: cathedral apse with revolutionary banner and dense crowd

events.description: moving from the nave into the apse area with a large hanging revolutionary banner
crowd density increases significantly as character enters the main gathering area

agents.ego_description: navigating through the dense crowd of NPCs in period clothing near the altar

notable_agents.action: crowd of revolutionaries densely packed facing the altar
woman in white dress observing the gathering

entered.detail: large white banner with cursive text hanging across the apse
elaborate gothic altar structure with gold detailing

segments.scene_description: The character moves into the cathedral apse where a dense crowd has gathered beneath a large revolutionary banner. The lighting becomes warmer and more direct, illuminating the ornate altar and the crowd of revolutionaries standing in the central area.

scene_state.functional_zone: side ambulatory with debris and barricades

events.description: character turns left away from the main altar toward a side corridor
passing through an ornate metal gate into a narrower side aisle

agents.ego_description: turning left and moving away from the crowd toward a quieter side corridor

entered.detail: decorative wrought iron gate with gold filigree patterns
stacked and scattered wooden chairs forming a barricade

segments.scene_description: The character turns left away from the crowded apse, moving through a debris-filled side ambulatory. The crowd thins out as the character approaches and passes through an ornate metal gate into a narrower corridor with barricades of stacked chairs and sandbags.

scene_state.functional_zone: transitional porch area with stairs and hay barricades

events.description: emerging from side corridor into open porch area with stone stairs and barricades
encountering uniformed guards standing watch near the stairs

agents.ego_description: walking through the side area and emerging near stone stairs with hay barricades

notable_agents.action: uniformed guard in blue coat and white crossbelt standing at attention

entered.detail: wide stone staircase leading up to a platform
large piles of hay and wooden crates forming barriers
raised wooden stage or platform with steps

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the narrow corridor into a transitional porch area featuring stone stairs and hay barricades. A uniformed guard stands watch to the left as the character approaches the stairs, with the cathedral's Gothic facade visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: Gothic choir area with wooden stalls and candle lighting

events.description: ascending stairs into the choir area with ornate wooden stalls
lighting becomes darker and more atmospheric with candlelight illuminating the wood carvings

agents.ego_description: walking up the stairs and through the choir stalls toward the high altar

notable_agents.action: guard in tricorn hat standing near the choir entrance

entered.detail: intricately carved dark wooden choir stalls lining both sides
tall brass candle stand with lit candles
the main altar at the far end of the choir

segments.scene_description: The character ascends the stairs into the dimly lit choir area, passing between ornate wooden stalls with intricate carvings. The atmosphere becomes more intimate and solemn, with candlelight replacing the bright natural light of the nave, as the character approaches the high altar.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through the grand interior of Notre-Dame Cathedral, transitioning from a crowded, sun-drenched nave into the solemn, dimly lit choir. It begins with the protagonist walking across a checkered marble floor toward a gathering of revolutionaries, where dramatic beams of sunlight pierce through high windows and tricolor flags hang from stone columns. As the character moves into the apse, the lighting becomes warmer and more direct, illuminating a dense crowd gathered beneath a large revolutionary banner and an ornate altar. The scene then shifts as the character turns away from the crowd, passing through a debris-filled ambulatory and an ornate metal gate into a narrow corridor blocked by sandbags and stacked chairs, before emerging into a porch area with stone stairs and a uniformed guard. Finally, the camera ascends the stairs and enters the intimate atmosphere of the choir, where bright natural light is replaced by candlelight filtering through intricate wooden stalls toward the high altar.
